      • getChannel

      • configureProxy

        public static void configureProxy​(io.grpc.ManagedChannelBuilder builder,
                                  java.lang.String proxyAddress)
        Configures the proxy settings for a NettyChannelBuilder if proxy address is specified
        Parameters:
        builder - NettyChannelBuilder to configure
        proxyAddress - proxy address

      • checkDatabaseExist

        public void checkDatabaseExist​(io.milvus.grpc.MilvusServiceGrpc.MilvusServiceBlockingStub blockingStub,

        public java.lang.String getServerVersion​(io.milvus.grpc.MilvusServiceGrpc.MilvusServiceBlockingStub blockingStub)

        public java.lang.String getHostName()

      • getLocalTimeStr

        public java.lang.String getLocalTimeStr()

      • getSDKVersion

        public java.lang.String getSDKVersion()

      • validateHostname

        public void validateHostname​(ConnectConfig connectConfig)
        Validates that the hostname can be resolved before attempting connection. This provides early failure with clear error messages for DNS issues.
        Parameters:
        connectConfig - Connection configuration containing the host to validate
        Throws:
        MilvusClientException - if hostname cannot be resolved

      • validatePort

        public void validatePort​(ConnectConfig connectConfig)
        Validates port number and tests connectivity.
        Parameters:
        connectConfig - Connection configuration containing the port to validate
        Throws:
        MilvusClientException - if port is invalid or unreachable

      • validateCert

        public void validateCert​(ConnectConfig connectConfig)
        Validates SSL connection with certificates.
        Parameters:
        connectConfig - Connection configuration
        Throws:
        MilvusClientException - if SSL connection fails
